name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: January 16, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
Cup of Joe

January 16, 2016
Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to recently. Thanks so much for reading. I appreciate your support.

Always Speaking to Our Values, from MSNBC to FOX

It doesn't matter to me whether I'm going on MSNBC or FOX News -- I will always be a strong voice for the same principles. It's why during the fight for health care reform, I went on FOX News a dozen times to defend Obamacare.

I continue to do the same, speaking this week as a national security expert on MSNBC as the Iranians were detaining 10 U.S. Navy sailors, and then later on FOX about the North Korean nuclear test. Click the images to the right to watch!

MSNBC
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=APglRiEpszw

FOX
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=46UKn1wEQeo

I also went on local television in Harrisburg and in Reading to talk about the incident with Iran, based on my experience commanding an aircraft carrier battle group and operating in the Persian Gulf.

I also said that it would be absolutely unforgivable for anyone to critique the young sailor who spoke in the Iranian propaganda video.

Click the images to the left to watch!

ABC27
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KVTV_-vR94c

WFMZ69
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Jm1P9mtqT00

Stories from Those We Served: A Nation of Immigrants

As the son of an immigrant, I know firsthand how America's immigrant heritage enriches our culture and strengthens our nation. It's why this week, as I talked about immigration policy, I shared the stories of two of my former congressional constituents who I helped with their own immigration issues. Click the images beside the quotes to see their stories.

"Joe in particular was a really huge driving force behind it, and without him stepping in, there is no way that the green card would have come so quickly." - Maria Alexander
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=35IEzbHvtYA

"The parents just said, 'Our children are yours. We're going to die here in Iraq.'" - Janice Kelsey
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OkMyVfecZ2k

Talking Immigration Policy in Norristown and Reading

In Norristown and Reading, I discussed with people the need for an immigration system that helps foreign-born students and professionals contribute to our shared economic mission, while also creating a tough but forward path to citizenship for unauthorized immigrants. Click the image to the left to read the coverage in The Reading Eagle or click to the right for the coverage in The Norristown Times Herald.

The Reading Eagle
http://www.readingeagle.com/news/article/sestak-stumps-in-reading-talks-border-security-immigration

The Norristown Times Herald
http://www.timesherald.com/general-news/20160113/sestak-visits-norristown-speaks-to-aclamo-on-immigration-reform

Si quiere mirar en español el chat en Norristown sobre reforma migratoria, Telemundo tiene video aquí:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=65Tl67kPSeY

Quiero ganarme la confianza de los residentes de Pennsylvania. Quiero que sepan que puedo estar en sus zapatos, y cuando llegue a Washington, Dios mediante, seguiré caminando en los zapatos de la gente.

Shabbat with a Shipmate

I was honored to be the guest speaker at the installation of Captain Jon Cutler as Rabbi at Beth Israel in Chester County.

I talked about the USAT Dorchester, which was struck by a torpedo in 1943, instantly killing many of the more than 900 men aboard, as those who survived struggled to escape the burning ship in the 20 minutes it took to sink below the waves.

In the chaos, the ship's four chaplains brought order, distributing life jackets to the crew until the only jackets remaining were their own. Giving up their four life jackets, the chaplains stood arm in arm against the angled deck, calmly praying for the remaining survivors in the waters around them as the ship fell into the seas.

That courage of serving others above themselves is what Navy chaplaincy is all about, and it was an honor to serve with men like Rabbi Cutler.

100 Days Until the April 26 Primary

We have 100 days to go... please consider giving:

$100 if you are able to, or
$10 if you can, because each
$1 brings us closer to victory!

Facebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

**Hello Friend,**
What a week! As you likely know, the first debate of 2016 was held on Thursday night in North Charleston. I hope you were able to watch, but just in case you weren't, [you can watch Ted's responses to the questions asked here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921611:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r). Following the debate, Ted joined a focus group of South Carolinians conducted by Frank Luntz where Luntz asked everyone in attendance who won the debate and if they thought Ted would beat Hillary in the November general election. **[You're going to want to see how they responded](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921612:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**!
That was just Thursday! Earlier in the week, Ted completed a 6 day, 28 county, barnstorming tour through Iowa where he met with thousands of caucus-goers in the Hawkeye State. You can [get a feel for what the energy was like throughout the #CruzinToCaucus tour here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921613:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r). After the Iowa tour, Ted continued on to Louisiana, South Carolina, and New Hampshire where we are continuing the #CruzToVictory bus tour. **[Find events near you here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921614:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**. Additionally, we are in the process of deploying the Strike Force we implemented to Iowa to help #CruzToVictory in South Carolina and New Hampshire. **If you are interested in being part of our Strike Force, sign up today to deploy to**[**South Carolina**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921615:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**or**[**New Hampshire**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921616:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r).
We were also especially glad to announce a very special endorsement this week. Phil Robertson, a professional hunter, businessman, Christian minister, and star on the popular television series Duck Dynasty joined the #CruzCrew! **[You'll want to watch this endorsement video](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921617:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)** :
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921610:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)
This week also saw several new TV ads from the campaign -- one of them named "[Sovereignty](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921618:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)." It is airing in South Carolina and tells the story of when Ted as Solicitor General fought and won in defense of U.S. sovereignty against the United Nations and the World Court.** [You can watch the ad here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921618:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921619:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)
We're just 16 days away from the Iowa Caucuses. And then we will quickly take the campaign on to New Hampshire, South Carolina, Nevada, the March 1st Super Tuesday states and beyond to clinch the Republican nomination for Ted. We need your help now more than ever. If you haven't yet signed up to volunteer with the campaign, please don't wait -- **[sign up today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921620:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**. And if you have, thank you! Please forward this email to your friends and _**[ask them to volunteer now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921620:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r)**_!
**Jeff Roe**
**Campaign Manager**
**Cruz for President**
P.S. Ted will appear on Fox News Sunday tomorrow, [so find your local air time here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32921621:sM_ndxyN_:m:1:1104269936:64526AF2722F0B60A164B98390F01280:r), and don't forget tune in!

Peter, I wanted to share with you below the video from my MSNBC interview today speaking about the context of the release of the American prisoners by Iran and its ties to the Iranian nuclear agreement that was also implemented this evening.

Through American diplomatic leadership, Iran - which was 30 days from a nuclear bomb - now cannot build a bomb for at least one year because we forced them to comply with the agreement shipping by almost 10,000 kilograms of enriched uranium out of the country, removing thousands of centrifuges and incapacitating the core of the Arak plutonium reactor.

I have been a vocal and written supporter of coming to this agreement for a number of years -- while Pat Toomey was writing a letter to the Ayatollah of Iran telling him to ignore our presidency, and even was calling yesterday to not implement the accord. We have a deficit -- almost an absence -- of leadership in the Senate today of leaders who can speak from experience on matters of military and foreign policy to best shape a secure and safe outcome.

There are 100 days until the Primary Election on April 26th. body:
Not an alarm - just the facts. | Friend --

We always knew this race would get tight, and that’s what’s happening now. Public polling shows we have a real race on our hands in Iowa and New Hampshire -- and make no mistake, we could lose one or both of these contests.

I’m not an alarmist; I’m a realist. Every $1 we raise between now and Iowa will make a difference in whether Hillary’s able to win the presidency and keep fighting for American families.

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A new, vile super PAC attack on Bernie
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
With just two weeks to go before the Iowa caucuses, the super PAC coordinating with Hillary Clinton's campaign is reportedly launching one of the most desperate and vile attacks imaginable: they are insinuating Bernie is too old and unhealthy to be our next president.
Let me be very clear with you: Bernie is in excellent health. But this personal attack is another example of a sickness in our democracy when it is so easy for millionaires and billionaires to buy up candidates and elections.
We are just three points behind in Iowa, but closing every day. We can't let super PAC attacks on Bernie's health and health care plan scare people away from voting for Bernie.
[**Your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign could be the difference between victory and defeat in the Democratic primary for our political revolution. Make one today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2a61/43f17890/45c9ee08/620f0bfb/3464198548/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/attacks-on-bernie?refcode=em160116-health-attack")
In spite of these Karl Rove-style attacks, Bernie's going to stay focused on the real issues impacting working families across the country. While he does that, we can make the millionaires and billionaires coordinating with the Clinton campaign pay a price for their attacks.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
